ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., WIN, LOSS) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., HOME, AWAY) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee(s) for the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Founding date of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number of the player */,
  "player_version" TEXT /* Version of the player data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "seconds_played" INTEGER /* Seconds played by the player in the game */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the player in the game */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score of the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the game */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the game */,
  "foul_percentage" REAL /* Foul percentage of the player in the game */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player in the game */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage of the player in the game */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the outcome belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., WIN, LOSS) */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin of victory or defeat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season statistic */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "seconds_played" INTEGER /* Seconds played by the player in the season */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the season */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the season */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made by the player in the season */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted by the player in the season */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the season */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the season */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the season */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the season */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the season */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the player in the season */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score of the player in the season */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player in the season */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the season */,
  "foul_percentage" REAL /* Foul percentage of the player in the season */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player in the season */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage of the player in the season */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff series */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the series belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the series */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "series_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the series (e.g., WIN, LOSS) */,
  "playoff_series_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the playoff series */,
  "number_of_games" INTEGER /* Number of games in the series */,
  "series_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the series */,
  "series_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoff_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff statistic */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "seconds_played" INTEGER /* Seconds played by the player in the series */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made by the player in the series */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted by the player in the series */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made by the player in the series */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted by the player in the series */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made by the player in the series */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted by the player in the series */,
  "offensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of offensive rebounds by the player in the series */,
  "defensive_rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of defensive rebounds by the player in the series */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player in the series */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player in the series */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player in the series */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player in the series */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of personal fouls by the player in the series */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Game score of the player in the series */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the series */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the series */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency rating of the player in the series */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating of the player in the series */,
  "foul_percentage" REAL /* Foul percentage of the player in the series */,
  "field_goal_percentage" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the player in the series */,
  "three_point_percentage" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage of the player in the series */,
  "free_throw_percentage" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the player in the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoff_stats_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("series_id") REFERENCES playoffs ("series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "fired_date" TEXT /* Date the coach was fired (if applicable) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coach_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach the statistic belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the coach in the game */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the coach in the game */,
  "points_for" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "points_against" INTEGER /* Points scored by the opponent */,
  "margin_of_victory" INTEGER /* Margin of victory or defeat */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_stats_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coach_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  "estimated_return_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of return from injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., MINOR, MAJOR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the suspension belongs to */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date of the suspension */,
  "suspension_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "suspension_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the suspension */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ADMIN, ANALYST) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., ACTIVE, INACTIVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access permission belongs to */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the access permission is for */,
  "read_permission" INTEGER /* Read permission for the user */,
  "write_permission" INTEGER /* Write permission for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
